resources:
Exit Reset Save State Load State Save State to Cloud Load State from Cloud Load Game Settings Choose bios Choose cartridge Choose Cpu Core Choose Video Core Audio output FPS Lock Landscape Mode Frameskip Keep original aspect rate Choose input Device Player1 Input Device Player2 Input Device Choose Edit Key Map Edit OnScreen Pad None Bios Cartridge Cpu Core Video Core Sound Graphics General Your device is not support OpenGL ES 3.0 or above.\nYou can not choose OpenGL Video Interface.\n Skip Support Support our development! \n\n You can support the upstream project of Yaba Sanshiro by making a donation directly on their website http://yabause.org. You can also support this project Yaba Sanshiro by clicking the donate button below, this will help towards development of more accurate emulation, input devices and a wider range of devices. This screen and advertisement screen will not be shown, If you have donated. Thank you for your donation! Failed to consume. Donate No, Thank you. $3 $5 $10 $30 Input the Key Joypad is not connected. This Key has already been set. Up Down Left Right Analog X Analog Y Analog L Trigger Analog R Trigger L Trigger R Trigger Start A B C X Y Z Menu Scale Transparency Do you want to save this setting? Yes No Exit Ignore New Dynamic Recompiler(faster than Interpreter. more accurate than Old Dynamic Recompiler) Old Dynamic Recompiler(fast but less accurate) Interpreter(slow but more accurate) OpenGL ES 3.1 Software Vulkan On-Screen Pad Select from other directory. ScreenShot Report Filter Choose Video Filter None FXAA Scanline Bilinear(Enables only when Native resolution is not selected) Videos by Your Company Related Videos Vertical Video Grid "Are you sure want to delete this item?"string> Error Ok Cancel Pause Play Stop 00:00 Play Pause Button Loading… No video was found About DemoCast Player Version: %1$s Popular Videos PREFERENCES Grid View Error Fragment Personal Settings Refresh Game List Select Background Image Thank you for your report! Failed to send report Media loading timed out Media server was not reachable Failed to load video An error occurred Dismiss Oops Yaba Sanshiro Polygon Generation Type Choose Polygon Generation type Sound Engine Choose sound engine Send App Invite uoYabause Play SEGA Saturn games using this app! https://b472u.app.goo.gl/YJ5F https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/orp-j3lNGj24xvfVBEQvwWyaVhOQ_aTGc0nwIInDXBlNGUnSOdB_hb8sPGSmgmd0Jvkx=h310-rw Install! Introduce Would you like to introduce this app? Rendering Resolution Aspect Ratio RBG Resolution Choose rendering resolution Choose rendering aspect ratio Choose RBG(Rotate Background) Screen Resolution Open CD Tray Close CD Tray Enable Analog Control Set As Title Icon Add New Code Use Compute Shader Enable Disable Edit Delete Select Game Directory Add Current(High quality version for high-end devices) Legacy(for low-end devices) Native(native resolution of this android device) 1080p 720p 4x 2x Original Original 4:3 16:9 Full screen Triangle using perspective correction CPU Tessellation GPU Tessellation Load Delete IsoDownload Download to .. Download to .. Internal Storage SD card Network error. Server is not found or not accessible. Server error. Unable to process file for MD5 Downloading CD-ROM Downloading Download Finished! Download Failed Download Cancelled Searching for a server.. Waiting for reading to finish. Checking file. Download file is broken. You need Wifi connection. Free space You don\'t have enough free space. Extend Internal Memory to 8MByte Hello blank fragment This function is not implemented yet. Memory Manager I have already donated to uoYabause(not Yaba Sanshiro) CheckPaymentActivity Send your order number for uoYabause to dismiss Ad. You can check your order id at http://payments.google.com This order number does not be found. This order number has been used. New Yaba Sanshiro is available Sign in is cancelled No internet connection Unknown Error Unknown sign in response Apple Sign In Error Apple Sign In was cancelled Are you sure to delete Share UnShare Send REVIEW: STATUS REPORT: Send current screenshot and state (Upload size is about 2MByte) Won\'t Boot Intro/Menu Playable Great Perfect Awful Bad Average Good Excellent Accept Decline Sign out Sign in Signing in enable to backup save data and state data to the cloud and share them between devices.\n However, these functions are experimental, so they do not work as expected, specifications may be changed or terminated without prior notice. Even if you don\'t sign in, libraries such as Firebase collect the information to improve your app. A detailed privacy policy can be found at https://www.uoyabause.org/static_pages/privacy_policy. I agree Do you want to sign in? Never ask me again Deleting file Are you sure want to delete this file? Copy to cloud Copy to external Copy to internal Activate Like Backup to Cloud Remove from Cloud Restore from Cloud Game backed up successfully Failed to backup game Game restored successfully Failed to restore game Backup limit reached (maximum 1 game) Legal Notice This file should only be used as a backup of a game you own. Please follow your country\'s laws regarding game backups. Available in cloud (tap to download) Download from Cloud Game removed from cloud successfully Failed to remove game from cloud Backup Limit Reached You have reached the maximum number of games you can back up. Select a game to replace: Replace Backed up on %1$s Please select a game to replace Successfully replaced backup Failed to replace backup 90 degree rotation GameSelectActivityPhone drawer_open drawer_close StartupActivity Force Android TV mode Game Select Screen Scsp synchronization count per a frame(1 - 255) You need to accept the permission request for using this app. Please restart again. Emulation Priority Speed Accuracy Sound time synchronization mode Sound time synchronization mode CPU time (Synchronize to emulated cpu time. If your device is fast enough, Sound emulation is very accurate.) Real time (Synchronize to real world time. Although your device is not so fast, Sound is not corrupted.) Privacy Policy Information If you already have been donated, Please contact smiyaxdev@gmail.com Close Show FPS Enable Frame skip Game Setting # Welcome! \n\n To play SEGA Saturn games, follow this instructions.\n\n 1. Generate an image file from your game CD-ROM using DiscImageChef or something. Useful tools are listed [here](http://wiki.redump.org/index.php?title=Useful_Links).\n 2. Copy the image files to the directory **\"%1$s\"** in the smart phone internal storage.\n 3. Show drawer menu and tap \"Refresh Game List\". Then game list is shown.\n 4. Tap the game title you want to play.\n 5. Enjoy!\n \n For more detail checkout this [Youtube video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ch6_KhhAg10).\n # Welcome! \n\n To play SEGA Saturn games, you have four options.\n\n ## 1. Copy games to this Android device directly.\n copy your ISO images to **\"%1$s\"**.\n ## 2. Copy to an external SD card.\n copy your ISO images to **\"%2$s\"** on an SD card.\n ## 3. Tap + button\n If you already have CHD or zipped iso images files. Just tap + button and select the file. \n\n ## 4. Select a directory that contains ISO images\n [Setting] -> [Select Game Directory] -> [ADD] \n\n More detail is described in our [web site](https://www.yabasanshiro.com/howto#android).\n DELETE CONFIRM NOT AVAILABLE! This function is only available for pro version Got it! Enter this PIN to your device Sign in to other devices Hide Status bar and Navigation bar YabaSnashiroSettingsActivity Messages Sync Your signature Default reply action Sync email periodically Download incoming attachments Automatically download attachments for incoming emails Only download attachments when manually requested Do you want to install? You can choose chd,zip file. If you install, you can play from this game list directly. It takes up MB of storage space. Action Replay Code Updating... Add a game Speed Limit Choose frame limit mode Normal Double No Limit Pro version is available!\n\n * No limit install count\n * Save/Load game state between devices\n * No advertisement\n\n Install Location Remaining installation count Remaining installation count is Which Storage? Or place game into \"%1$s\" manually. By Tapping START button, you agree to the terms of use. Note: The Privacy Policy describes how data is handled. YabaSanshiro sends diagnostics data to devMiyax and third party services to help improve the app. Use CPU affinity Use SH2 cache Leaderboard Pos. Name Time Diff This game does not have a leaderboard yet This game does not support leaderboard yet Leaderboard Restore defaults Detail Last play game: Device: Auto backup sync Auto backup sync Fail to upload backup data to cloud Fail to unzip backup data from cloud Success to download backup data from cloud Fail to download backup data from cloud Fail to zip backup data Success to upload backup data to cloud In the case of an asymmetric multi-core CPU, the higher clocked cores are preferentially utilized. However, depending on the device, there may be a decrease in performance in reverse. Enabling the emulation of SH2 cache processing improves compatibility. However, it comes at the cost of emulation speed. Enable Auto State Save Automatically saves the state upon exiting. The next time it starts, it can resume from the saved point. However, there may be cases where reproduction is not successful. Auto state save data found! Do you want to load the state? Unfortunately, it may not be very reliable. If it doesn\'t work well, please tap Cancel. Load State Force feedback Visual feedback Show Analog/Dpad switch button File not found: %1$s I/O error occurred: %1$s Read permission denied: %1$s Other File Error: %1$s No Game file is selected Search games Sort games Toggle view mode Tap to start game Sort by Sort by name Sort by release date Sort by recently played Game menu Fail to open %1$s with %2$s Fail to open %1$s Fail to initialize Fail to get game code. This file is not SEGA Saturn game. Fail to initialize emulator Request for Notification Permission By allowing notifications, you will receive news from the developer. Permission Required Write permission is required to delete game files. Please select the folder containing your game files to grant permission.

Post your review!


Note: Your review content, username, and profile icon will be publicly visible. Before posting please check the privacy policy. Discord Logo Link Discord Account Link Your Discord Account Would you like to link your Discord account? This will update your profile with your Discord username and avatar. Discord account successfully linked! Failed to link Discord account Discord linking error Discord linking cancelled Discord account already linked Unlink Discord Account Are you sure you want to unlink your Discord account? Discord account unlinked Link Your Discord Account Link your Discord account to use your Discord username and avatar in this app. Skip for now Link Discord Account Would you like to link your Discord account? Yes, Link Account No, Thanks Discord Authentication Processing Discord account link... Account Sync your username and avatar image with your Discord one. You can log in to the Windows version of Yaba Ssanshiro with the pin displayed. Delete Account Delete your account and all associated data Delete Account Are you sure you want to delete your account? This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone. Account successfully deleted Failed to delete account This feature is not available on Android TV. Please use your phone or tablet. Enable Discord Webhook Notifications Discord Webhook URL Enter the Discord webhook URL to post new records New Record Posted Your new record has been posted to Discord Failed to post to Discord
